creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: No.  We should perhaps refactor kdump.c a bit so it doesn't become too large, but truss already includes support for decoding some Linux system calls as well.  I should probably finish my WIP of moving the mksubr-generated tables into libsysdecode (so they are shared with truss) as that might make it easier for you to add decoding of Linux system calls in both places (truss and kdump).
